summary: Cavallo blog post about the company's home on the Sunshine Coast of BC, its global reach in 26+ countries, and local press coverage in the Coast Reporter after a viral video.
Reflective Cavallo blog post on a harsh Pacific Northwest winter, protecting horses through storms, and welcoming spring with references to yoga Sun Salutations.
Customer testimonial from Mike Garrett of Crown Point, Indiana, praising Cavallo Hoof Boots for protecting his barefoot, tender-footed horse on gravel, mud, water, and snow.
Short customer testimonial from Carol Wild (UK) describing how new Cavallo boots improved her horse Ariel's movement over jumps and on the road.
Blog post on the Houston Mounted Police going barefoot and bitless, citing 1984 Swiss Cavalry research on the destructive impact and vibration forces of metal horseshoes.
Guide-style post helping riders choose the right Cavallo hoof boot style, with embedded videos comparing boot models and demonstrating measuring and fitting.
Customer testimonial from Sheila in Coulterville, California, on using Cavallo Simple and Sport Boots to resolve abscesses from thin walls and nailing shoes.
Informational blog post on White Line Disease in horses: its possible causes, early detection, and natural treatments like apple cider vinegar and tea tree oil with Cavallo boots.
Teaser blog post hinting at a new green Cavallo trail product to be unveiled in the next newsletter, inviting readers to guess.
Event recap of Cavallo attending the Back Country Horsemen of BC 2018 Rendezvous in Barriere, BC, including rides, dinners, and an auction fundraiser with donated hoof boots.
Brief post promoting Carole Herder's article 'The Hoof We See and a Disease of the White Line' in Natural Horse Magazine (Jul/Aug/Sep 2018), with a link to read it.
Customer testimonial from Deborah Renz (Vancouver Island, BC) on using Cavallo ELBs with gel pads to help a flat-footed quarter horse go from limping to cantering.
